title: Summarize Conference Transcript with Keynote Speaker Quotes
scenario: Write a prompt to summarize a 30-minute keynote speech transcript. The target output should include the speaker's name, title, main points, and 3 notable quotes. The output should be in a structured format with headings for each section. Limit the prompt to 150 words.
constraints: Must include the speaker's name and title
Must have at least 3 notable quotes from the speech

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if all constraints are met
Verify if the output is in a structured format with headings
Assess if the main points are accurate and concise
